title: Sweet Middle Eastern Almond Stir-fry
description: A fluffy, dairy-free solo-dinner dish featuring almond extract and sweetened with honey or maple syrup for a deliciously indulgent treat.
instructions: Toast almonds in a dry pan until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Let cool.
In a large bowl, mix toasted almonds with honey and maple syrup; set aside to marinate for at least 10 minutes.
Heat cooking spray or oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and grated ginger, sautéing until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add almond mixture to the skillet and stir-fry for another 4-5 minutes, stirring frequently to coat almonds evenly with syrup mixture.
Stir in cornstarch and cook for an additional minute or until thickened. Remove from heat.
Serve warm as a dessert or snack accompaniment.
